recent_excerpts: Enterprises report a sharp rise in AI-generated phishing campaigns that craft personalized lures at scale, moving from broad sprays to 1-to-1 targeting in the last six months.
Specops Software documents how helpdesk social engineering turns password reset requests into full account compromise — attackers bypass MFA and gain persistent access.
A trojanized Slack installer delivers a remote access tool that creates a hidden desktop, allowing attackers to bypass multi-factor authentication and silently control victim machines.
